homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (very poor) to 7 (excellent).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

prompts.0: How correct is the information in the caption with relation to the audio? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, incorrect information) to 7 (best, accurate information)
prompts.1: Does this description contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (entire caption completely unrelated to the audio clip) to 7 (completely related)

questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track blends a driving reggae beat with a groovy bassline and electronic drums to create an upbeat, danceable atmosphere. A male vocalist provides rhythm over the complex keyboard accompaniment, resulting in sound that feels perfect for a club or party setting.

questions.name: Sample 3
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: A male vocalist delivers a romantic ballad characterized by a slow, steady tempo and sentimental mood. The track features a gentle keyboard harmony supported by a strong bass line and electronic drums to create an emotional atmosphere. Although related tracks often exhibit energetic dance qualities, this specific segment focuses on a softer, more intimate style suitable for a movie scene.

questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track from the INNIT Project blends heavy metal and doom influences with a dark, ominous atmosphere. Distorted guitars and synthesizers combine to create a powerful, aggressive soundscape that evokes tension and foreboding. The overall mood suits a dark fantasy setting, reinforcing the piece's intense and hypnotic quality.

questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This segment is an instrumental fantasy soundtrack that relies on a choir, strings, and harpsichord to create a solemn, Baroque-era atmosphere. The music moves at a slow, steady pace driven by a percussive bass line, evoking a grand sense of awe suitable for cinematic scenes. Although the upload title suggests a pop standard by Elvis Presley, the audio itself features no vocals or electric instruments.

While the music features a dark and heavy mood typical of experimental electronic genres, its relentless energy keeps the listener engaged from start to finish.
